application_id_str.description: Copies the value from corresponding id field as string. Use to avoid JS rounding problems.

attached_rules.description: A mapping showing a number of attached rules by recommendation

overriding_accept.description: Number of rules that returned overriding accept recommendation

refuse.description: Number of rules that returned refuse recommendation

review.description: Number of rules that returned review recommendation

accept.description: Number of rules that returned accept recommendation

trust.description: Number of rules that returned trust recommendation
